joke: I told my computer I needed a break, and now it keeps showing me vacation ads.
I used to be addicted to the hokey pokey, but then I turned myself around.
Why don’t eggs tell each other secrets? They might crack up.
Why don’t skeletons fight each other? They don’t have the guts.
What do you call cheese that isn’t yours? Nacho cheese.
I used to be a banker, but I lost interest.
Why did the scarecrow win an award? Because he was outstanding in his field.
Why did the bicycle fall over? Because it was two-tired.
Why was the math book sad? It had too many problems.
What do clouds wear under their shorts? Thunderpants.
Why did the fish blush? Because it saw the ocean’s bottom.
I used to hate facial hair, but then it grew on me.
Why did the picture go to jail? Because it was framed.
Why did the lamp get promoted? Because it was outstanding in its light of work.
I broke up with my pencil. It had no point.
Why was the calendar always invited to parties? It knew all the dates.
Comedian: What did one wall say to the other wall? I'll meet you at the corner.
I told my suitcase there’d be no vacation this year, and now I’m dealing with emotional baggage.
Why did the belt get arrested? For holding up a pair of pants.
I have a joke about construction, but I’m still working on it.
Why don’t scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything.
Why did the golfer bring an extra tee? In case he got a little behind.
Comedian: I'm so good at sleeping, I can do it with my eyes closed.
I was wondering why the boomerang wouldn’t come back. Then it hit me.
Why did the musician bring a ladder? To reach the high notes.
Why don’t ghosts tell lies? Because you can see right through them.
Why did the chair get promoted? It always supported everyone.
Why did the king go to the dentist? He needed his crown checked.
What did the janitor say when he jumped out of the closet? Supplies!
I’d tell you a joke about patience, but you probably wouldn’t wait for the punchline.
